{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032122522380F7099E4A01A9570558"}"},"total":182},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7274592875718329128","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"每个人物都很鲜活，看这本书完全没有那些当代流行网文的感觉，就像是这本书没有既定的剧本，每个人物都在不遗余力的改变这现实，而最终，有莘不破和林儿能够重逢的结局是我最满意的答案。作者的能力真的很强悍，到处都是伏笔，故事从头到尾非常完整，各种文化背景，史诗史实信手拈来，不乏对生死命运等的思考。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1693748214,"group_id":"6951690896073034783","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx5fxqYzTX4+QQ+wErOjnIBgR4PG7Mc89W3pO6b8gKuw","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2676650891555662","user_name":"夜游神的遗迹"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2676650891555662","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6951690896073034783","book_info":{"abstract":"4000年前,一个叫有莘不破的少年,独自游荡在如今已是繁华都市的大荒原上,本是商王朝的王孙,王位继承人,此时却是一个逃出王宫的叛逆少年。在他身后,中国最古老的两个王朝正在交替,夏王朝和商王朝之间,爆发了有史以来最伟大的战争。
本书将带您重返远古战场,和那些古老的英雄一起,游历《山海经》中的蛮荒世界,您将遇到后羿的子孙、祝融的后代、看到女娲补天缺掉的那块巨石、您将经过怪兽横行的雷泽、战火纷飞的巴国,直至遭遇中华文明蒙昧时代最原始、最神秘的信仰。本书依据中国最古老的经典《山海经》写成,再现上古时代的地理及人文风俗。我们今天能看到这些,全拜秦始皇所赐:《山海经》秦始皇焚书时,唯一看了舍不得烧的书。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/426418f9f5975e16bdf1e32ff01907d6~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"阿菩 著","author_id":"","book_id":"6951690896073034783","book_name":"山海经密码大全集（共5册）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0c0c0","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"29.7万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":971,"name":"玄幻小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=971&name=玄幻小说&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6951691930749111328","read_count":"4678","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"906159"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"42","tags":"精品小说,玄幻小说","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/426418f9f5975e16bdf1e32ff01907d6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779288744&x-signature=NdwIF1ruwkDvjRdw33ayj0WDnwE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.6401265e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032122522380F7099E4A01A9570558"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读16小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":28,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":56401,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":14226},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7601446944957760318","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，推荐，人物鲜活，喜欢江离"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769854244,"group_id":"6951690896073034783","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"嗯。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3PqXeOZz+Qdy7F1+zafOnYtjWrcE+66TNRMKvZFP3JQ","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1," 本书将带您重返远古战场,和那些古老的英雄一起,游历《山海经》中的蛮荒世界,您将遇到后羿的子孙、祝融的后代、看到女娲补天缺掉的那块巨石、您将经过怪兽横行的雷泽、战火纷飞的巴国,直至遭遇中华文明蒙昧时代最原始、最神秘的信仰。本书依据中国最古老的经典《山海经》写成,再现上古时代的地理及人文风俗。我们今天能看到这些,全拜秦始皇所赐:《山海经》秦始皇焚书时,唯一看了舍不得烧的书。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/426418f9f5975e16bdf1e32ff01907d6~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"阿菩 著","author_id":"","book_id":"6951690896073034783","book_name":"山海经密码大全集（共5册）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0c0c0","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"29.7万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":971,"name":"玄幻小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=971&name=玄幻小说&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6951691930749111328","read_count":"4678","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"906159"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"42","tags":"精品小说,玄幻小说","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/426418f9f5975e16bdf1e32ff01907d6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779288744&x-signature=NdwIF1ruwkDvjRdw33ayj0WDnwE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032122522380F7099E4A01A9570558"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读55分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":15,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3283,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1633},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7599673432940593944","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这个小说我很喜欢不破和阿离两人的互动，我非常的喜欢，也特别的好看，好嗑！有一点不好的，是我还是更喜欢科双男
一开始抱着随便看一张，试试水，后面越看越上头，也是真的很喜欢，阿离宝宝真的很好，这是我小说里面第一次喜欢的，除主角之外的角色，就是说不上来的好！
阿离宝宝只要你过幸福，我会比你先落泪。
愿君安康，顺遂"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769439793,"group_id":"6951690896073034783","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"人生几何，能够得到知己","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4+bVYYpBNESJwJJv6uwylCaqMrZt9f9FQAApgLWPQQd","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8bd1e9cb17fd41979bced6efe426d131~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776617916&x-signature=GtConNNeljPwSnKCudj1qkhfcBM%3D","user_id":"2619466255444857","user_name":"南湖东站"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2619466255444857","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6951690896073034783","book_info":{"abstract":"4000年前,一个叫有莘不破的少年,独自游荡在如今已是繁华都市的大荒原上,本是商王朝的王孙,王位继承人,此时却是一个逃出王宫的叛逆少年。在他身后,中国最古老的两个王朝正在交替,夏王朝和商王朝之间,爆发了有史以来最伟大的战争。
